hero.thesis: Create and sell Notion templates tailored for therapists to streamline their compliance-friendly intake and session notes processes.
hero.marketSize: Approximately 1.2 million therapists in the US alone, with increasing reliance on digital tools for practice management.
hero.payingEvidence: Rising demand for digital organization tools among therapists, as evidenced by growing communities in therapist-specific forums and the popularity of Notion in professional circles.

ninetyDay.title: Research and Design

actions.action: Join therapist communities on Reddit (r/Therapists), LinkedIn groups, and Discord (Therapist Hub) to gather insights.
Conduct a quick survey using Typeform to understand common pain points in intake and session notes.
Draft initial template designs based on collected data using Notion.

ninetyDay.metric: 3 viable template drafts based on real therapist needs.

actions.action: Share template drafts in therapist communities for feedback.
actions.success: Received feedback from at least 5 therapists.

actions.action: Iterate on templates based on feedback; focus on compliance and ease-of-use.
Finalize templates and prepare for listing on Gumroad.

ninetyDay.title: Launch Preparation

actions.action: Set up a Gumroad account and list templates with compelling descriptions and visuals.
Create a simple landing page using Webflow to drive traffic to Gumroad listings.
actions.success: Landing page live with link to Gumroad.

actions.action: Craft a launch email sequence in ConvertKit targeting therapist communities.

ninetyDay.metric: Templates listed and ready for launch on Gumroad.

actions.action: Send launch email to the list gathered from therapist communities.
Promote templates in therapist communities with special launch discount.
Track sales and gather initial customer feedback for further iteration.

ninetyDay.title: Optimize and Automate

actions.action: Analyze feedback and sales data to identify high-performing templates.
Set up automated follow-up emails in ConvertKit for customer feedback.
Optimize Gumroad listings based on keyword research for better discoverability.

ninetyDay.metric: Increased visibility and engagement on listings.

ninetyDay.title: Expand Reach

actions.action: Identify and reach out to 5 therapist influencers for potential partnerships or shoutouts.
Offer exclusive discounts to therapist Facebook groups and forums.
Participate in a live Q&A in a therapist community to increase visibility.

ninetyDay.metric: Expanded reach to 200+ new potential customers.

actions.action: Write a blog post on the benefits of digital organization for therapists and share across social media.
Create a short video tutorial on using the templates, upload to YouTube and share link in communities.
Schedule weekly tips on using Notion for therapists in ConvertKit to nurture leads.

ninetyDay.title: Refinement and Scale

actions.action: Conduct a mid-point review of sales and customer feedback to refine templates further.
Explore additional distribution channels like Whop for further reach.
Begin exploring partnerships with therapy software companies for bundle offers.

ninetyDay.metric: Improved product offerings and expanded distribution.

actions.action: Launch a dedicated Discord server for therapist template users to foster community and gather feedback.
Organize a monthly webinar on effective Notion usage for therapists.
Promote community benefits in all listings and communications.
actions.success: Community benefits highlighted in all channels.

actions.action: Develop a case study from existing users highlighting efficiency improvements.
Use case study in targeted LinkedIn ads for therapists.
Analyze ad performance and adjust targeting for better ROI.
actions.success: Improved targeting based on performance data.

actions.action: Conduct a comprehensive review of all marketing efforts and sales data.
actions.success: Completed review and identified key areas for improvement.

actions.action: Identify underperforming areas and create an action plan to address them.
Implement quick fixes and prepare for more strategic changes based on review.

ninetyDay.title: Strategic Expansion

actions.action: Explore the possibility of creating specialized templates for niche therapist categories (e.g., child therapists, marriage counselors).
Begin development of niche-specific templates.
Plan a launch strategy for niche templates with targeted marketing campaigns.

ninetyDay.metric: Preparation for launching new product lines.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: Core platform for building and customizing templates.
toolStack.pricing: Free for personal use, $8/user/month for team plans.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: For creating a professional landing page quickly.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Email marketing and automation to manage customer interactions.
toolStack.pricing: Free for up to 300 subscribers, then $29/month.

toolStack.name: Typeform
toolStack.why: For conducting surveys to understand customer needs.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Hi [Name],

I'm developing a set of Notion templates specifically for therapists, designed to simplify compliance-friendly intake and session notes. I believe these could help streamline your workflow and enhance client management. I'd love to offer you a discount for your feedback. Let me know if you're interested!

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial message, follow-up in 3 days, final follow-up in 7 days.

pricing.premium: $199 for unlimited access to all current and future templates
pricing.raisingRules: Evaluate after 3 months based on demand and feedback, consider a 10-20% increase.

failureModes: Trap of No Feedback: Ignoring community feedback leads to poor product-market fit.
Overpricing Trap: Setting prices too high without established demand.
Marketing Myopia: Focusing too narrowly on a single channel.
Community Neglect: Failing to engage with your user community.
Feature Creep: Adding unnecessary features that complicate templates.
Ignoring Analytics: Not using data to guide decisions.
Underleveraging Partnerships: Not exploring collaborations with industry influencers.
Content Vacuum: Not producing enough content to drive organic traffic.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas for LLC formation to handle compliance and streamline payments.
setup.payments: Set up payments through Gumroad for seamless transactions.
setup.contracts: Draft simple terms of service using Lovable for template usage agreements.
setup.insurance: Consider general liability insurance if expanding into physical products or in-person workshops.

scaling: As sales grow, consider hiring a virtual assistant to manage customer inquiries and community engagement. Outsource design to freelancers via platforms like Lovable for creating niche-specific templates. Expand distribution channels by partnering with therapy software companies to bundle your templates with their offerings. Finally, develop a content strategy with a dedicated marketer to increase brand visibility through SEO, blogging, and social media campaigns.
